relations.subject: Maracaibo tody-flycatcher
relations.evidence: The species primarily inhabits semi-arid and arid coastal scrublands and woodlands where it favors areas with Acacia, Cercidium, Cardon, and Opuntia vegetation

relations.subject: Maracaibo tody-flycatcher
relations.evidence: To a much lesser extent it is also found in tropical deciduous forest and gallery forest

relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Maracaibo tody-flycatcher
relations.evidence: "Although expanses of suitable habitat remain within its limited range, substantial areas have been destroyed, principally around Lago de Maracaibo, as a result of burgeoning tourism, development pressures, overgrazing, firewood-gathering and pollution." It is considered fairly common and occurs in several protected areas
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
